title: Amtech I0227 35 Piece ¼ Drive Metric Socket Set
features: EASY AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: This metric socket set has a 72T compact ratchet with a quick release and a comfort grip for ease of use
VERSATILE: It has nine ¼" drive 6 point metric sockets, plus a universal joint and 100mm extension
COMPREHENSIVE: The set includes 22 assorted 25mm bits, including PH, PZ, flat, hex. and Torx
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
description: This versatile 35 piece metric socket set has a 72T compact ratchet with quick release and a comfort grip for ease of use. With nine ¼" drive 6 point metric sockets, plus a universal joint and 100mm extension, it also includes 22 assorted 25mm bits, including PH, PZ, flat, hex. and Torx®.
